summary: Iteration 14: i18n localization testing for Athan Tales app. Tested translation switching for Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, Period Tracker, and Zakat Calculator pages across multiple languages.

integration_issues.issue: Header shows 'Användarvillkor' (Swedish) but ALL content shows English text fallback. sv.json has English text for termsIntroTitle, termsIntroText, termsServiceTitle, etc.
Header shows 'Gebruiksvoorwaarden' (Dutch) but ALL content shows English text fallback. nl.json has English text for all terms-related keys.
el.json has English text for all terms-related keys instead of Greek translations.

sv.notes: Header Swedish but content English fallback

nl.notes: Header Dutch but content English fallback

el.notes: Locale file has English text for terms keys

en.notes: Zakat Calculator, Currency, Nisab, Gold Value, Silver Value in English

el.notes: Greek content showing correctly with Εισαγωγή, Υπεύθυνος Επεξεργασίας

action_items: CRITICAL: Add Swedish translations for Terms of Service keys in /app/frontend/src/locales/sv.json (termsIntroTitle, termsIntroText, termsServiceTitle, termsServiceText, termsAccountsTitle, termsAccount1-4, etc.)
CRITICAL: Add Dutch translations for Terms of Service keys in /app/frontend/src/locales/nl.json
CRITICAL: Add Greek translations for Terms of Service keys in /app/frontend/src/locales/el.json
critical_code_review_comments: sv.json, nl.json, el.json locale files have English text instead of proper translations for Terms of Service section (lines ~1580-1602)
The termsOfService header key is translated but the content keys (termsIntroTitle, termsIntroText, etc.) are English placeholders
context_for_next_testing_agent: The app uses i18next for translations. Language can be switched via localStorage.setItem('user-selected-locale', 'de'). Routes are /terms (not /terms-of-service), /privacy (not /privacy-policy), /zakat (not /zakat-calculator), /period-tracker. Privacy Policy uses PRIVACY_CONTENT object in PrivacyPolicy.tsx which is correctly translated for all languages. Terms of Service uses t() function with i18n locale files where sv, nl, el are missing translations.
